## **2.2.2.G. PI #7**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

Within the framework of the ATHENIAN Project, new Performance-Based Navigation (PBN) procedures are being developed

in order to improve traffic flows and enhance flight efficiency. The ATHENIAN Project is expected to be completed in 2028.
